title: Refactor a Worker to a Pages Function
excerpt: title: Refactor a Worker to a Pages Function description: Migrate an existing Cloudflare Worker into a Pages Function for your Pages project. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this guide, you will learn how to refactor a Worker made to intake form submissions to a Pages Function that can be hosted on your Cloudflare Pages application. [Pages Functions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/functions/) is a serverless function that lives within the same project directory as your application and is deployed with Cloudflare Pages.…
